reviews.review_description: I prefer this on the HoloLens because of the AR function. I think this would be much more useful in a clinical setting if the background in the Quest app was enabled for AR for Quest 3.

developer_response.body: Following up on users' feedback, the app now supports passthrough mode on Quest 3, allowing for an AR-style experience similar to HoloLens. This makes it more practical in clinical and real-world settings. Thank you for helping us improve!
